notes: base_distance_matrix is the driving duration in seconds at 03:00 local Monday (off-peak reference) returned by the Google Maps Distance Matrix API. For each slot t, multiplier = mean over all O-D pairs of duration_in_traffic_t(i,j) / base(i,j). distance_matrix = round(base * multiplier, 2); duration_in_traffic_matrix carries the raw per-edge value at the queried departure_time.
